description_long: This object consists of two stylized coconut palm trees with thick, ringed trunks and dense, broad green fronds radiating outward from the tops. The trunks are vertically striped in alternating light and dark brown bands, giving a textured, layered appearance. The fronds are large, flat, and segmented, with a vibrant green color and subtle notches along the edges, arranged in a circular canopy. The two trees are positioned close together, with one slightly taller and more robust than the other, suggesting a natural grouping. No visible coconuts or fruit are present among the leaves, and the base of the trunks is rounded and slightly flared. The overall look is clean and stylized, with a cartoon-like simplicity and no visible background elements.
description: A pair of stylized coconut palm trees with ringed trunks and broad, segmented green fronds, closely grouped together. The design is clean and cartoon-like, with no visible coconuts or background.
description_view_0: Two palm trees are visible side by side, with the left tree taller and both showing their leafy canopies and ringed trunks.
description_view_1: The trees are aligned front-to-back, with the taller tree in front and both canopies clearly visible, emphasizing their layered fronds.
description_view_2: The pair of trees are seen from the opposite side, with the right tree now appearing taller and both trunks and canopies visible.
description_view_3: A single palm tree is centered, showing its full canopy and trunk, with the second tree mostly obscured behind.
attribute_husk_pattern: No visible coconut husk; the trunks have a ringed, banded texture with alternating light and dark brown stripes, while the fronds are smooth and segmented with subtle notches.
attribute_growth_cluster: No individual coconuts are visible; the object depicts two palm trees grouped together.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The coconuts are not visible, but the palm trees are depicted as a close pair, with trunks nearly touching.
